## Verification loop

<!-- All four must pass locally before requesting review (see CONTRIBUTING.md). -->

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo build --workspace`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`
